visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young boys pose in a brightly lit lobby with large windows, standing in front of Crayon Shin-chan character statues and cutouts. One boy wears a fuzzy brown and white vest over a sweater and holds a yellow gift box while the other smiles broadly behind him. (2) The scene shifts to promotional posters and close-up views of ticket receipts for a museum event. A finished, large circular cookie with Crayon Shin-chan's face made of dark dough is presented. (3) The camera pans across a large indoor workshop area with rows of long yellow tables. Families are seated, working on various crafts in a high-ceilinged, well-lit studio environment. (4) A woman with dark hair helps the young boy at a table, using a white sanitizing wipe to clean his hands before they begin working with green and yellow dough balls on trays. (5) Multiple quick cuts show the boy and the woman using rolling pins, plastic templates, and a set of paper instructions to shape the dough into character faces. (6) While waiting, the boys are seen playing in a colorful play zone within the building, featuring large yellow pipe tunnels and interactive digital drawing screens. (7) A staff member wearing a blue shirt, mask, and black hat presents the freshly baked large cookie on a tray. The boy carefully slides the cookie into a yellow cardboard box with Crayon Shin-chan graphics. (8) The final scene takes place in a dimly lit restaurant at night. The boy sits at a table with hot pot dishes and takes large bites of the cookie while a woman across from him gives a thumbs-up gesture.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 大阪限定 DIY蠟筆小新餅乾. [Logo]: @HanHan. (2) [Subtitle]: 假日開放五個場次. [Variety]: 10:30、11:30、13:30、14:30、15:30. (3) [Slogan]: 大阪擁抱博物館. [Subtitle]: 4/6前 門票優惠1800日幣 (原價2000日幣). (4) [Subtitle]: 每天早上可以開始預約. (5) [Variety]: 環境空間. [Subtitle]: 每場活動後都會清潔乾淨. (6) [Subtitle]: 環境非常整潔舒適. (7) [Variety]: 製作說明. [Subtitle]: 現場還有提供洗手台跟消毒濕紙巾喔. (8) [Variety]: 餅乾製作中. [Subtitle]: 一場活動需預留一個半小時. (9) [Subtitle]: 30分鐘做餅乾 50分鐘等它烤. (10) [Variety]: 真心說餅乾真的很香很好吃. (11) [Slogan]: 準備送進烤箱囉. [Subtitle]: 烘培時間約50分鐘. (12) [Slogan]: 館內提供多項免費設施. [Subtitle]: 等待時不用擔心無聊. (13) [Slogan]: 憑單領取餅乾. [Subtitle]: 時間到了再拿單子. (14) [Subtitle]: 去取餅乾跟盒子就可以囉. (15) [Variety]: DIY包裝紙盒. [Variety]: 完成. (16) [Subtitle]: 迫不及待 迫不及待. [Variety]: 好吃嗎. (17) [Variety]: (吃得津津有味).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main children, 1 main female caregiver, and at least 5 other people including staff and other museum visitors.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young boys, one with glasses wearing a brown and white fuzzy sweater, and one in a grey sweater. An adult woman with long dark hair wearing a striped shirt or a brown coat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary location is the Hu+g Museum in Osaka, featuring modern glass architecture, bright yellow workshop tables, and colorful Crayon Shin-chan themed decorations. The second location is a restaurant with soft indoor lighting and window views of the city at night.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-tempo, bright electronic pop music with a strong synth beat begins. A female narrator speaks with an enthusiastic, high-arousal tone in Mandarin. A 'pop' sound effect highlights the appearance of on-screen text. (2) Music continues as a steady background layer. A digital 'ding' sound triggers a new phase, signifying a piece of advice or information being shared. Light room tone and distant indoor background murmurs are present. (3) A 'whoosh' transition sound occurs as the visual scenes cut rapidly. The narrator's speech becomes more rhythmic, matching the upbeat BPM of the music. A young child's voice briefly exclaims in the background with high pitch. (4) The sounds of light plastic rustling and the soft thuds of dough being manipulated are heard. The BGM maintains a happy, major-key mood. A playful 'twinkle' SFX plays during a close-up of the character cookie. (5) As the children play in the museum, cartoon-style 'boing' and 'sparkle' SFX are layered over the mix to emphasize movement. The narration continues at a fast pace. (6) A musical stinger with a celebratory 'tada' feel plays as the final product is revealed. The environment shifts to a restaurant, where clear sounds of a percussive 'crunch' from a bite are heard. (7) The video concludes with the narrator laughing and asking a question in a warm tone, followed by a final comedic cartoon sound effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Location Intro -> Workshop Process -> Playtime Interval -> Final Result -> Consumption Experience
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a highly energetic and informative guide for families visiting Osaka, specifically showcasing the DIY Crayon Shin-chan cookie workshop at the Hu+g Museum. It blends vlog-style personal experiences with practical tips like pricing, scheduling, and facility reviews to encourage viewer engagement and visits.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of ticket prices, venue names, operating hours, and specific promotional content for the Hu+g Museum in Osaka.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High production value for social media, utilizing rapid editing, variety-show style text overlays, and synchronized sound effects to maintain high viewer attention.
